title: Spawn Eggs Recipes
body:
Add more Spawn Eggs Recipes!

Such as:

![1](https://cdn-raw.modrinth.com/data/kBa53lTo/images/3a7c7ce4b66c85787b735f4037a74fa435f91f49.png)
![2](https://cdn-raw.modrinth.com/data/kBa53lTo/images/9d81abc08cc9debe62c122fc144e44b7ee54b0a7.png)
![3](https://cdn-raw.modrinth.com/data/kBa53lTo/images/e51039e551da5c473f89c118134ffa2ec9c9a608.png)

Version 24w03a 24w05a , this mod/datapack requires [Ye Corn](https://www.mcmod.cn/download/13987.html) as a prerequisite.

This is the page for version 1.0.0+, for other versions:

Old Version Fabric:[https://modrinth.com/mod/ser](https://modrinth.com/mod/ser)

Other Version (Old Version Forge & NeoForge & Fabric & Datapack & Beta & Alpha) :[https://www.mcmod.cn/download/8266.html](https://www.mcmod.cn/download/8266.html)
